1. 模块概述

1.1 Enqueue 模块的作用

Enqueue 模块是 NCCL 的核心调度引擎，负责将用户提交的集合通信任务转换为可执行的 CUDA 内核计划。它是连接高层 API 和底层 CUDA 内核的关键桥梁。本文基于NCCL版本（master commit b17addf19bd427f349d262d7734cebde33ea992e）。 源文件: nccl/src/enqueue.cc (2737 lines), nccl/src/include/enqueue.h (41 lines) ， 核心功能: 内核调度、任务编排、执行计划生成

用户调用流程:
  ncclAllReduce()  →  [Enqueue模块]  →  CUDA Kernel Launch
      ↓                    ↓                    ↓
  任务提交          计划生成与调度        GPU执行

1.2 核心功能

功能模块职责关键函数
任务准备解析、分类、排序任务ncclPrepareTasks
算法选择选择最优算法和协议getAlgoInfo
通道分配分配通信通道scheduleCollTasksToPlan
计划生成生成内核执行计划ncclLaunchPrepare
内核启动启动CUDA内核ncclLaunchKernel
Proxy管理上传代理操作uploadProxyOps
资源回收清理计划资源reclaimPlan

1.3 系统位置

NCCL 系统架构:
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                   用户 API 层                           │
│  ncclAllReduce, ncclBroadcast, ncclSend/Recv, etc.    │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                        ↓
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                   Group 层                              │
│  ncclGroupStart/End, 任务收集                          │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                        ↓
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│              ★ ENQUEUE 模块 ★                          │
│  ┌─────────────┐  ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────────┐  │
│  │ 任务准备     │→│ 算法选择      │→│ 计划生成      │  │
│  │ PrepareTasks│  │ getAlgoInfo  │  │ LaunchPrepare│  │
│  └─────────────┘  └──────────────┘  └──────────────┘  │
│         ↓                ↓                  ↓            │
│  ┌─────────────┐  ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────────┐  │
│  │ 通道分配     │  │ 批量管理      │  │ 内核启动      │  │
│  │ scheduleXxx │  │ addWorkBatch │  │ LaunchKernel │  │
│  └─────────────┘  └──────────────┘  └──────────────┘  │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                        ↓
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                 内核执行层                              │
│  ncclDevKernel, Primitives, Algorithms                │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

2. 核心架构与设计理念

2.1 整体设计理念

2.1.1 分离式调度

关注点分离: 将任务调度分为多个独立阶段，每个阶段专注于特定职责。

阶段划分:
  [准备阶段]  →  [规划阶段]  →  [启动阶段]  →  [完成阶段]
       ↓             ↓             ↓             ↓
   任务解析      计划生成      内核启动      资源回收

2.1.2 预算管理 (Budget Management)

使用内存预算机制控制单个计划的大小:

// enqueue.cc: L270-283
struct ncclKernelPlanBudget {
  ssize_t inArgsBytes;   // 内核参数内可用空间
  ssize_t outArgsBytes;  // 外部存储可用空间 (FIFO或持久化缓冲区)
};

static bool testBudget(
    struct ncclKernelPlanBudget* budget, 
    int nWorkBatches, 
    ssize_t workBytes) {
  ssize_t batchBytes = nWorkBatches*sizeof(struct ncclDevWorkBatch);
  bool ok = false;
  ok |= (batchBytes + workBytes <= budget->inArgsBytes);
  ok |= (batchBytes <= budget->inArgsBytes) && 
        (workBytes <= budget->outArgsBytes);
  return ok;
}

预算策略:

  • 内核参数内存: 有限空间 (~4KB-64KB)
  • FIFO 环形缓冲区: 半FIFO容量 (避免单个内核占用过多)
  • 持久化内存: 无限制 (用于CUDA Graph)

2.1.3 任务聚合 (Task Aggregation)

将相似任务聚合以减少内核启动次数:

// enqueue.cc: L392-397
// 聚合在4X大小范围内的操作
while (aggEnd != nullptr && 
       aggEnd->trafficBytes < 4*aggBeg->trafficBytes) {
  agg.count += aggEnd->count;
  agg.trafficBytes += aggEnd->trafficBytes;
  aggEnd = aggEnd->next;
}

2.2 三层计划架构

┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                  WipPlan (工作中的计划)                   │
│  ├─ 临时通道状态 (wipPlan.channels[])                    │
│  ├─ 批量累积 (wipBatch)                                  │
│  └─ 代理操作队列 (proxyOpQueue)                          │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                        ↓ finishPlan()
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│              ncclKernelPlan (完整计划)                    │
│  ├─ kernelArgs (内核参数)                                │
│  ├─ workQueue (工作项队列)                               │
│  ├─ proxyOpQueue (代理操作)                              │
│  ├─ channelMask (使用的通道位掩码)                        │
│  └─ threadPerBlock (每块线程数)                          │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                        ↓ uploadWork()
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│            设备端执行 (Device Execution)                  │
│  ├─ ncclDevKernelArgs (设备参数)                         │
│  ├─ ncclDevWorkBatch[] (批量数组)                        │
│  └─ ncclDevWorkColl/P2p (工作项)                         │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

2.3 执行模式

模式触发条件内存分配特点
FIFO常规执行环形缓冲区内存复用,低延迟
PersistentCUDA Graph捕获持久化分配图重放,延迟最低
Args数据量小内核参数内零拷贝,适合小任务

3. 关键数据结构

3.1 ncclKernelPlan - 执行计划

// comm.h: L252-268
struct ncclKernelPlan {
  struct ncclCommCallback reclaimer;           // 资源回收回调
  struct ncclComm* comm;                       // 通信器引用
  struct ncclKernelPlan* next;                 // 计划链表
  
  // 执行参数
  void* kernelFn;                              // 内核函数指针
  struct ncclDevKernelArgs* kernelArgs;        // 内核参数
  size_t kernelArgsSize;                       // 参数大小
  uint64_t channelMask;                        // 通道位掩码
  int threadPerBlock;                          // 每块线程数
  
  // 工作项管理
  struct ncclIntruQueue<ncclWorkList> workQueue;       // 工作队列
  size_t workBytes;                            // 工作数据总字节
  int nWorkBatches;                            // 批量数量
  enum ncclDevWorkStorageType workStorageType; // 存储类型
  void* workBufPersistent;                     // 持久化缓冲区
  
  // 代理与任务
  struct ncclIntruQueue<ncclProxyOp> proxyOpQueue;     // 代理操作
  struct ncclIntruQueue<ncclTaskColl> collTaskQueue;   // 集合任务
  struct ncclIntruQueue<ncclTaskP2p> p2pTaskQueue;     // P2P任务
  
  // 状态标志
  bool persistent;                             // 是否持久化
  bool kernelSpecialized;                      // 是否特化内核
  bool hasProxyOps;                            // 是否有代理操作
  bool isSymColl;                              // 是否对称集合
  bool isCeColl;                               // 是否CE集合
  bool isHostCbEnq;                            // 是否已入队主机回调
  
  // 计数器
  uint64_t collOpCount;                        // 集合操作计数
  
  // 清理队列
  struct ncclIntruQueue<ncclCommCallback> cleanupQueue;
};

3.2 ncclKernelPlanner - 计划器

// comm.h: L368-441
struct ncclKernelPlanner {
  bool persistent;                             // 持久化模式
  cudaGraph_t capturingGraph;                  // 捕获的图
  struct ncclCudaStreamList* streams;          // CUDA流列表
  
  // 任务队列
  struct ncclIntruQueue<ncclTaskColl> collTaskQueue;     // 集合任务
  struct ncclIntruQueue<ncclTaskColl> collSymTaskQueue;  // 对称任务
  struct ncclIntruQueue<ncclTaskColl> collCeTaskQueue;   // CE任务
  struct ncclTaskCollSorter collSorter;                  // 任务排序器
  
  // P2P管理
  struct Peer* peers;                          // 对等节点数组
  int nTasksP2p;                               // P2P任务总数
  int nTasksP2pSend;                           // 发送任务数
  int nTasksP2pRecv;                           // 接收任务数
  
  // 工作管理
  struct ncclIntruQueue<ncclWorkList> collWorkQueue;     // 集合工作
  struct ncclIntruQueue<ncclWorkList> tmpCollWorkQueue;  // 临时工作
  struct ncclIntruQueue<ncclCommCallback> collCleanupQueue; // 清理队列
  
  // 计划队列
  struct ncclIntruQueue<ncclKernelPlan> planQueue;       // 计划队列
  struct ncclKernelPlan* unlaunchedPlansHead;            // 未启动计划
  
  // 工作中的计划状态
  struct WipPlan {
    struct Channel {
      struct ncclIntruQueue<ncclWorkBatchList> workBatchQueue;
      struct ncclIntruQueue<ncclProxyOp> proxyOpQueue;
      int nWorkBatchesP2p;                     // P2P批量数
      struct {
        size_t workBytes;                      // 工作字节数
        int nP2ps;                             // P2P操作数
        int p2pRounds[NCCL_MAX_DEV_WORK_P2P_PER_BATCH];
      } wipBatch;
    } channels[MAXCHANNELS];
  } wipPlan;
  
  int nTasksColl;                              // 集合任务计数
};

3.3 ncclKernelPlanBudget - 预算管理

// enqueue.cc: L270-273
struct ncclKernelPlanBudget {
  ssize_t inArgsBytes;   // 内核参数内可用空间
  ssize_t outArgsBytes;  // 外部存储可用空间
};

预算计算:

// enqueue.cc: L1460-1463
budget.inArgsBytes = comm->workArgsBytes - sizeof(struct ncclDevKernelArgs);
budget.outArgsBytes = plan->persistent ? (1<<30)  // 持久化: ~1GB
                                       : comm->workFifoBytes/2;  // 非持久化: 半FIFO

3.4 ncclDevWorkBatch - 工作批量

struct ncclDevWorkBatch {
  uint8_t workType;                            // 工作类型
  uint8_t funcId;                              // 函数ID
  uint8_t nextExtends : 1;                     // 是否扩展
  uint8_t nextJump : 7;                        // 跳转偏移
  uint32_t offsetBase;                         // 偏移基址
  uint64_t offsetBitset;                       // 偏移位集
};

批量聚合逻辑:

// enqueue.cc: L110-180
// 创建新批量的条件:
newBatch |= (chan->workBatchQueue.tail == nullptr);        // 首次
newBatch |= batch->workType != (uint8_t)workType;          // 类型不同
newBatch |= batch->funcId != devFuncId;                    // 函数不同
newBatch |= NCCL_MAX_DEV_WORK_BATCH_BYTES < 
            chan->wipBatch.workBytes + workSize;           // 超出大小限制

4. 任务准备与调度流程

4.1 整体流程

┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│               ncclPrepareTasks 执行流程                   │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                           │
│  1. 从排序器取出任务 (按大小降序)                         │
│     taskCollSorterDequeueAll()                           │
│          ↓                                                │
│  2. 按 (func, op, type) 分组                             │
│     tasksByFnOpTy[index] = task                          │
│          ↓                                                │
│  3. 对称任务处理 (如果支持)                               │
│     ncclMakeSymmetricTaskList()                          │
│          ↓                                                │
│  4. 对每组任务聚合并选择算法                              │
│     ├─ 聚合 4X 范围内的任务                              │
│     ├─ getCollNetSupport()                               │
│     ├─ getAlgoInfo()  ← 算法/协议选择                    │
│     └─ 计算 devFuncId                                    │
│          ↓                                                │
│  5. 按约束条件分箱 (collnet × nvls)                      │
│     collBins[isCollnet][isNvls]                          │
│          ↓                                                │
│  6. 注册缓冲区 (NVLS 任务)                               │
│     ncclRegisterCollNvlsBuffers()                        │
│          ↓                                                │
│  7. 构建 ncclDevWorkColl 结构                            │
│     ├─ 填充 sendbuff, recvbuff, root, nWarps            │
│     ├─ 设置 regUsed, netRegUsed 标志                    │
│     └─ 入队 planner->collWorkQueue                       │
│                                                           │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

源码实现:

// enqueue.cc: L346-509
ncclResult_t ncclPrepareTasks(
    struct ncclComm* comm, 
    bool* algoNeedConnect, 
    bool* needConnect, 
    ncclSimInfo_t* simInfo) {
  
  struct ncclKernelPlanner* planner = &comm->planner;
  planner->persistent = ncclCudaGraphValid(planner->capturingGraph);

  // 1. 从排序器取出任务 (大小降序)
  struct ncclTaskColl* task = ncclTaskCollSorterDequeueAll(&planner->collSorter);
  
  // 2. 按 (func,op,ty) 分组
  struct ncclTaskColl* tasksByFnOpTy[ncclNumFuncs*ncclNumDevRedOps*ncclNumTypes];
  memset(tasksByFnOpTy, 0, sizeof(tasksByFnOpTy));
  int fnOpTyIndices[ncclNumFuncs*ncclNumDevRedOps*ncclNumTypes];
  int fnOpTyCount = 0;

  // 3. 对称任务处理
  if (comm->symmetricSupport) {
    NCCLCHECK(ncclMakeSymmetricTaskList(
      comm, task, &planner->collSymTaskQueue, &task));
  }

  // 分组到 LIFO
  while (task != nullptr) {
    struct ncclTaskColl* next = task->next;
    int index = ((int)task->func*ncclNumDevRedOps + (int)task->opDev.op)*
                 ncclNumTypes + (int)task->datatype;
    if (tasksByFnOpTy[index] == nullptr) 
      fnOpTyIndices[fnOpTyCount++] = index;
    task->next = tasksByFnOpTy[index];
    tasksByFnOpTy[index] = task;
    task = next;
  }

  // 4. 对每组任务进行聚合和算法选择
  struct ncclIntruQueue<struct ncclTaskColl> collBins[2][2] = {};
  for (int cursor=0; cursor < fnOpTyCount; cursor++) {
    struct ncclTaskColl* aggBeg = tasksByFnOpTy[fnOpTyIndices[cursor]];
    int collNetSupport = 0;
    NCCLCHECK(getCollNetSupport(comm, aggBeg, &collNetSupport));
    int nvlsSupport = comm->nvlsSupport && 
                     (ncclNvlsSupported(aggBeg->opDev.op, aggBeg->datatype) || 
                      aggBeg->func == ncclFuncAllGather);
    
    int nTasksPerChannel = divUp(comm->planner.nTasksColl, comm->nChannels);
    
    do {
      struct ncclTaskColl* aggEnd = aggBeg->next;
      struct ncclTaskColl agg = *aggBeg;
      
      // 聚合 4X 大小范围内的操作
      while (aggEnd != nullptr && 
             aggEnd->trafficBytes < 4*aggBeg->trafficBytes) {
        agg.count += aggEnd->count;
        agg.trafficBytes += aggEnd->trafficBytes;
        aggEnd = aggEnd->next;
      }

      // 选择算法和协议
      NCCLCHECK(getAlgoInfo(comm, &agg, collNetSupport, 
                            nvlsSupport, nTasksPerChannel, simInfo));
      agg.devFuncId = ncclDevFuncId(agg.func, agg.opDev.op, 
                                    agg.datatype, agg.algorithm, agg.protocol);

      // 确定 collnet 和 nvls 标志
      int isCollnet=0, isNvls=0;
      switch (agg.algorithm) {
      case NCCL_ALGO_NVLS:
      case NCCL_ALGO_NVLS_TREE:
        isNvls = 1;
        isCollnet = agg.algorithm == NCCL_ALGO_NVLS && comm->nNodes > 1;
        break;
      case NCCL_ALGO_COLLNET_CHAIN:
      case NCCL_ALGO_COLLNET_DIRECT:
        isCollnet = 1;
        break;
      }
      
      // 更新聚合范围内的所有任务
      do {
        struct ncclTaskColl* next = aggBeg->next;
        aggBeg->algorithm = agg.algorithm;
        aggBeg->protocol = agg.protocol;
        if (aggBeg->protocol == NCCL_PROTO_LL) 
          aggBeg->trafficBytes *= 4;
        aggBeg->nMaxChannels = agg.nMaxChannels;
        aggBeg->nWarps = agg.nWarps;
        aggBeg->devFuncId = agg.devFuncId;
        aggBeg->isCollnet = isCollnet;
        aggBeg->isNvls = isNvls;
        ncclIntruQueueEnqueue(&collBins[isCollnet][isNvls], aggBeg);
        aggBeg = next;
      } while (aggBeg != aggEnd);
    } while (aggBeg != nullptr);
  }

  // 5. 合并分箱到最终队列
  for (int isCollnet=0; isCollnet <= 1; isCollnet++) {
    for (int isNvls=0; isNvls <= 1; isNvls++) {
      ncclIntruQueueTransfer(&planner->collTaskQueue, 
                            &collBins[isCollnet][isNvls]);
    }
  }

  // 6-7. 注册缓冲区并构建工作项
  task = ncclIntruQueueHead(&planner->collTaskQueue);
  while (task != nullptr) {
    void* regBufSend[NCCL_MAX_LOCAL_RANKS];
    void* regBufRecv[NCCL_MAX_LOCAL_RANKS];
    bool regNeedConnect = true;
    ncclRegisterCollNvlsBuffers(comm, task, regBufSend, regBufRecv, 
                                &planner->collCleanupQueue, &regNeedConnect);

    // 更新算法初始化标志
    if (comm->runtimeConn && 
        comm->initAlgoChannels[task->algorithm] == false) {
      if (task->algorithm == NCCL_ALGO_NVLS_TREE && 
          comm->initAlgoChannels[NCCL_ALGO_NVLS] == false && 
          regNeedConnect == true) {
        comm->initAlgoChannels[NCCL_ALGO_NVLS] = true;
        algoNeedConnect[NCCL_ALGO_NVLS] = true;
      }
      if (task->algorithm != NCCL_ALGO_NVLS || regNeedConnect == true) {
        comm->initAlgoChannels[task->algorithm] = true;
        algoNeedConnect[task->algorithm] = true;
        *needConnect = true;
      }
    }

    // 构建工作项 (NVLS或普通)
    if (task->algorithm == NCCL_ALGO_NVLS_TREE || 
        task->algorithm == NCCL_ALGO_NVLS) {
      struct ncclDevWorkColl devWork = {};
      devWork.sendbuff = (void*)task->sendbuff;
      devWork.recvbuff = (void*)task->recvbuff;
      devWork.sendbuffOffset = task->sendbuffOffset;
      devWork.recvbuffOffset = task->recvbuffOffset;
      devWork.root = task->root;
      devWork.nWarps = task->nWarps;
      devWork.redOpArg = task->opDev.scalarArg;
      devWork.redOpArgIsPtr = task->opDev.scalarArgIsPtr;
      devWork.oneNode = (comm->nNodes == 1);
      devWork.netRegUsed = devWork.regUsed = 0;
      devWork.profilerEnabled = ncclProfilerPluginLoaded() && 
                                (task->eActivationMask & ncclProfileKernelCh);
      if (task->regBufType & NCCL_NET_REG_BUFFER)
        devWork.netRegUsed = 1;
      if (task->regBufType & (NCCL_IPC_REG_BUFFER | NCCL_NVLS_REG_BUFFER))
        devWork.regUsed = 1;

      struct ncclWorkList* workNode;
      if (task->regBufType & NCCL_NVLS_REG_BUFFER) {
        struct ncclDevWorkCollReg workReg = {};
        workReg.coll = devWork;
        workReg.dnInputs[0] = regBufSend[0];
        workReg.dnOutputs[0] = regBufRecv[0];
        workNode = ncclMemoryStackAllocInlineArray<ncclWorkList, ncclDevWorkCollReg>
                   (&comm->memScoped, 1);
        workNode->workType = ncclDevWorkTypeCollReg;
        workNode->size = sizeof(struct ncclDevWorkCollReg);
        memcpy((void*)(workNode + 1), (void*)&workReg, workNode->size);
      } else {
        workNode = ncclMemoryStackAllocInlineArray<ncclWorkList, ncclDevWorkColl>
                   (&comm->memScoped, 1);
        workNode->workType = ncclDevWorkTypeColl;
        workNode->size = sizeof(struct ncclDevWorkColl);
        memcpy((void*)(workNode + 1), (void*)&devWork, workNode->size);
      }

      ncclIntruQueueEnqueue(&planner->tmpCollWorkQueue, workNode);
    }
    task = task->next;
  }

  return ncclSuccess;
}

4.2 任务分组策略

分组键: (func, op, datatype)

int index = ((int)task->func * ncclNumDevRedOps + (int)task->opDev.op) *
             ncclNumTypes + (int)task->datatype;

分组目的:

  1. 聚合相似任务 - 减少内核启动次数
  2. 统一算法选择 - 同组任务使用相同算法/协议
  3. 批量优化 - 提高通道利用率

分箱策略 (CollNet × NVLS):

collBins[0][0]: 标准算法, 非NVLS
collBins[0][1]: 标准算法, NVLS
collBins[1][0]: CollNet, 非NVLS
collBins[1][1]: CollNet, NVLS

5. 执行计划生成

5.1 计划生成流程

┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│             ncclLaunchPrepare 执行流程                    │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                           │
│  WHILE (有待处理任务) {                                   │
│                                                           │
│    1. 初始化 WipPlan                                     │
│       memset(&planner->wipPlan, 0, ...)                  │
│                                                           │
│    2. 分配 ncclKernelPlan                                │
│       plan = ncclMemoryPoolAlloc(...)                    │
│       plan->workStorageType = persistent ?               │
│                  ncclDevWorkStorageTypePersistent :      │
│                  ncclDevWorkStorageTypeFifo              │
│                                                           │
│    3. 路由到特定调度器                                    │
│       ├─ CE Collective:                                  │
│       │   ├─ 构建 ceCollArgs                            │
│       │   └─ 单任务单计划                               │
│       ├─ Symmetric Collective:                          │
│       │   └─ ncclSymmetricTaskScheduler()               │
│       └─ 标准流程:                                       │
│           ├─ 计算预算                                    │
│           │   budget.inArgsBytes = workArgsBytes - ...  │
│           │   budget.outArgsBytes = persistent ? 1GB :  │
│           │                         workFifoBytes/2     │
│           ├─ 调度集合任务                                │
│           │   scheduleCollTasksToPlan()                 │
│           └─ 调度P2P任务                                 │
│               scheduleP2pTasksToPlan()                   │
│                                                           │
│    4. 完成计划                                            │
│       finishPlan(comm, plan)                             │
│       ├─ 设置 threadPerBlock                            │
│       ├─ 决定 workStorageType                           │
│       ├─ 分配 kernelArgs                                │
│       ├─ 放置工作批量 (Round-Robin)                      │
│       └─ 合并代理操作队列                                │
│                                                           │
│    5. 入队计划                                            │
│       ncclIntruQueueEnqueue(&planner->planQueue, plan)   │
│  }                                                        │
│                                                           │
│  6. 流同步准备                                            │
│     ├─ userStream[0] waits on userStream[i]             │
│     ├─ userStream[0] waits on deviceStream              │
│     └─ userStream[0] waits on launchOrder (可选)         │
│                                                           │
│  7. Host回调入队 (如需)                                   │
│     cudaLaunchHostFunc(hostStream, hostStreamPlanCallback)│
│                                                           │
│  8. 持久化注册 (Graph捕获)                                │
│     ncclCudaGraphAddDestructor()                         │
│                                                           │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

源码实现:

// enqueue.cc: L1417-1550
ncclResult_t ncclLaunchPrepare(struct ncclComm* comm) {
  ncclResult_t result = ncclSuccess;
  struct ncclKernelPlanner* planner = &comm->planner;
  bool persistent = ncclCudaGraphValid(planner->capturingGraph);
  planner->persistent = persistent;
  int nPlans = 0;

  if (planner->nTasksColl + planner->nTasksP2p != 0 ||
      !ncclIntruQueueEmpty(&planner->collSymTaskQueue) ||
      !ncclIntruQueueEmpty(&planner->collCeTaskQueue)) {
    do {
      memset(&planner->wipPlan, 0, sizeof(planner->wipPlan));

      struct ncclKernelPlan* plan = ncclMemoryPoolAlloc<struct ncclKernelPlan>
                                    (&comm->memPool_ncclKernelPlan, 
                                     &comm->memPermanent);
      plan->comm = comm;
      plan->reclaimer.fn = reclaimPlan;
      plan->persistent = persistent;
      plan->workStorageType = persistent ? ncclDevWorkStorageTypePersistent
                                         : ncclDevWorkStorageTypeFifo;

      // CE Collective 路径
      if (!ncclIntruQueueEmpty(&planner->collCeTaskQueue)) {
        struct ncclTaskColl* task = ncclIntruQueueHead(&planner->collCeTaskQueue);
        plan->isCeColl = true;
        plan->ceCollArgs = ncclMemoryStackAlloc<struct ncclCeCollArgs>
                          (&comm->memScoped);
        plan->ceCollArgs->rootRank = task->root;
        plan->ceCollArgs->nElts = task->count;
        plan->ceCollArgs->eltSize = ncclTypeSize(task->datatype);
        plan->ceCollArgs->sendBuff = (uint8_t*)task->sendbuff;
        plan->ceCollArgs->recvBuff = (uint8_t*)task->recvbuff;
        plan->ceCollArgs->func = task->func;
        plan->ceCollArgs->sendWin = task->sendWin;
        plan->ceCollArgs->recvWin = task->recvWin;

        ncclIntruQueueEnqueue(&planner->planQueue, plan);
        ncclIntruQueueDequeue(&planner->collCeTaskQueue);
        ncclMemoryPoolFree(&comm->memPool_ncclTaskColl, task);
        nPlans += 1;
      } else {
        // Symmetric Collective 路径
        if (!ncclIntruQueueEmpty(&planner->collSymTaskQueue)) {
          NCCLCHECKGOTO(ncclSymmetricTaskScheduler(comm, 
                        &planner->collSymTaskQueue, plan), result, failure);
        }
        // 标准路径
        else {
          struct ncclKernelPlanBudget budget;
          budget.inArgsBytes = comm->workArgsBytes - 
                              sizeof(struct ncclDevKernelArgs);
          budget.outArgsBytes = plan->persistent ? (1<<30) 
                                                 : comm->workFifoBytes/2;

          // 先调度集合任务
          if (planner->nTasksColl != 0) {
            NCCLCHECKGOTO(scheduleCollTasksToPlan(comm, plan, &budget), 
                         result, failure);
          }
          // 再调度P2P任务
          if (planner->nTasksColl == 0 && planner->nTasksP2p != 0) {
            NCCLCHECKGOTO(scheduleP2pTasksToPlan(comm, plan, &budget), 
                         result, failure);
          }
        }

        finishPlan(comm, plan);
        if (plan->workBytes != 0) {
          ncclIntruQueueEnqueue(&planner->planQueue, plan);
          nPlans += 1;
        }
      }
    } while (planner->nTasksColl + planner->nTasksP2p != 0 ||
             !ncclIntruQueueEmpty(&planner->collSymTaskQueue) ||
             !ncclIntruQueueEmpty(&planner->collCeTaskQueue));

    struct ncclKernelPlan* planHead = ncclIntruQueueHead(&planner->planQueue);
    planner->unlaunchedPlansHead = planHead;

    if (nPlans == 0) return ncclSuccess;

    cudaStream_t launchStream = planner->streams->stream;
    cudaStream_t deviceStream, launchOrder;
    NCCLCHECKGOTO(ncclStrongStreamAcquire(planner->capturingGraph, 
                  &comm->sharedRes->deviceStream, /*concurrent=*/false, 
                  &deviceStream), result, failure);

    // userStream[0] waits on each userStream[i]...
    for (struct ncclCudaStreamList* l=planner->streams->next; 
         l != nullptr; l = l->next) {
      CUDACHECKGOTO(cudaEventRecord(comm->sharedRes->scratchEvent, l->stream), 
                   result, failure);
      CUDACHECKGOTO(cudaStreamWaitEvent(launchStream, 
                   comm->sharedRes->scratchEvent, 0), result, failure);
    }
    // userStream[0] waits on deviceStream
    NCCLCHECKGOTO(ncclStreamWaitStream(launchStream, deviceStream, 
                  comm->sharedRes->scratchEvent), result, failure);

    bool capturing = ncclCudaGraphValid(planner->capturingGraph);
    enum ncclImplicitOrder implicitOrder;
    cudaError_t status = cudaSuccess;
    NCCLCHECKGOTO(getImplicitOrder(&implicitOrder, capturing), result, failure);

    if (implicitOrder != ncclImplicitOrderNone) {
      bool concurrent = capturing;
      NCCLCHECKGOTO(ncclStrongStreamAcquire(planner->capturingGraph, 
                    &comm->context->launchOrder, concurrent, &launchOrder), 
                    result, failure);
      NCCLCHECKGOTO(ncclStreamWaitStream(launchStream, launchOrder, 
                    comm->sharedRes->scratchEvent), result, failure);
    }

    if (!persistent && comm->sharedRes->persistentRefs) 
      status = cudaEventQuery(comm->sharedRes->hostStream.serialEvent);
    
    if (persistent || ncclCudaLaunchBlocking || status == cudaErrorNotReady) {
      bool acquired = false;
      cudaStream_t hostStream;
      for (struct ncclKernelPlan* plan=planHead; plan != nullptr; 
           plan = plan->next) {
        if (plan->hasProxyOps) {
          if (!acquired) {
            acquired = true;
            NCCLCHECKGOTO(ncclStrongStreamAcquire(planner->capturingGraph, 
                          &comm->sharedRes->hostStream, /*concurrent=*/false, 
                          &hostStream), result, failure);
          }
          plan->isHostCbEnq = true;
          CUDACHECKGOTO(cudaLaunchHostFunc(hostStream, 
                        hostStreamPlanCallback, plan), result, failure);
        }
      }
      if (acquired) {
        NCCLCHECKGOTO(ncclStreamWaitStream(launchStream, hostStream, 
                      comm->sharedRes->scratchEvent), result, failure);
        NCCLCHECKGOTO(ncclStrongStreamRelease(planner->capturingGraph, 
                      &comm->sharedRes->hostStream, /*concurrent=*/false), 
                      result, failure);
      }
    }

    if (persistent) {
      comm->sharedRes->persistentRefs += nPlans;
      comm->localPersistentRefs += nPlans;
      NCCLCHECKGOTO(ncclCudaGraphAddDestructor(planner->capturingGraph, 
                    persistentDestructor, (void*)planHead), result, failure);
    }
  }
failure:
  return result;
}

5.2 finishPlan 详解

// enqueue.cc: L182-256
static void finishPlan(struct ncclComm* comm, struct ncclKernelPlan* plan) {
  ncclKernelPlanner::WipPlan::Channel* wipChannels = comm->planner.wipPlan.channels;
  size_t workBytes = plan->workBytes;
  size_t batchBytes = plan->nWorkBatches*sizeof(struct ncclDevWorkBatch);

  if (plan->isSymColl) return;
  plan->threadPerBlock = std::max(plan->threadPerBlock, NCCL_MIN_NTHREADS);

  // 如果能放入内核参数则优化为 Args 模式
  if (sizeof(ncclDevKernelArgs) + batchBytes + workBytes <= comm->workArgsBytes) {
    plan->workStorageType = ncclDevWorkStorageTypeArgs;
  }
  
  plan->kernelArgsSize = sizeof(struct ncclDevKernelArgs) + batchBytes;
  plan->kernelArgsSize += (plan->workStorageType == ncclDevWorkStorageTypeArgs) 
                          ? workBytes : 0;
  plan->kernelArgsSize = alignUp(plan->kernelArgsSize, 16);
  
  plan->kernelArgs = (struct ncclDevKernelArgs*)ncclMemoryStackAlloc(
                     &comm->memScoped, plan->kernelArgsSize, /*align=*/16);
  plan->kernelArgs->comm = comm->devComm;
  plan->kernelArgs->channelMask = plan->channelMask;
  plan->kernelArgs->workStorageType = plan->workStorageType;

  // Round-Robin 放置批量到 kernelArgs
  uint64_t hasBatchMask = plan->channelMask;
  struct ncclDevWorkBatch* batchPrev[MAXCHANNELS] = {}; 
  struct ncclDevWorkBatch* batchZero = (struct ncclDevWorkBatch*)(plan->kernelArgs+1);
  int batchIx = 0;
  
  while (hasBatchMask != 0) {
    uint64_t tmpMask = hasBatchMask;
    do {
      int c = popFirstOneBit(&tmpMask);
      if (!ncclIntruQueueEmpty(&wipChannels[c].workBatchQueue)) {
        struct ncclWorkBatchList* batchNode = 
          ncclIntruQueueDequeue(&wipChannels[c].workBatchQueue);
        if (batchPrev[c] != nullptr) {
          batchPrev[c]->nextJump = int(&batchZero[batchIx] - batchPrev[c]);
        }
        batchPrev[c] = &batchZero[batchIx];
        batchZero[batchIx++] = batchNode->batch;
      }
      if (ncclIntruQueueEmpty(&wipChannels[c].workBatchQueue)) {
        hasBatchMask ^= 1ull<<c;
      }
    } while (tmpMask != 0);
  }

  // 合并代理操作队列 (按 opCount 排序)
  uint64_t headIds[MAXCHANNELS];
  int nHeads = 0;
  int channelUbound = 0;
  for (int c=0; c < MAXCHANNELS; c++) {
    struct ncclProxyOp* op = ncclIntruQueueHead(&wipChannels[c].proxyOpQueue);
    headIds[c] = op ? op->opCount : uint64_t(-1);
    if (op) nHeads += 1;
    if (op) plan->hasProxyOps = true;
    if (op) channelUbound = c+1;
  }
  
  while (nHeads != 0) {
    int c = -1;
    uint64_t minId = uint64_t(-1);
    for (int c1=0; c1 < channelUbound; c1++) {
      uint64_t id = headIds[c1];
      id = (id>>1 | id<<63); // 移动标志位: 集合操作优先于P2P
      if (id < minId) { c = c1; minId = id; }
    }
    struct ncclProxyOp* op = ncclIntruQueueDequeue(&wipChannels[c].proxyOpQueue);
    struct ncclProxyOp* opNext = ncclIntruQueueHead(&wipChannels[c].proxyOpQueue);
    headIds[c] = opNext ? opNext->opCount : uint64_t(-1);
    nHeads -= opNext ? 0 : 1;
    ncclIntruQueueEnqueue(&plan->proxyOpQueue, op);
  }
}

finishPlan 关键步骤:

1, 存储类型决策:

  • 如果 batchBytes + workBytes ≤ workArgsBytes: 使用 Args 模式
  • 否则使用原计划的 FIFO 或 Persistent 模式

2, 批量放置 (Round-Robin):

通道 0: [Batch_0_0] → [Batch_0_1] → ...
   通道 1: [Batch_1_0] → [Batch_1_1] → ...
   通道 2: [Batch_2_0] → [Batch_2_1] → ...
   
   放置顺序 (batchZero 数组):
   [Batch_0_0, Batch_1_0, Batch_2_0, Batch_0_1, Batch_1_1, ...]

3, 代理操作合并:

  • 按 opCount 升序合并
  • 集合操作优先于 P2P (通过标志位调整)

6.1 启动流程

6.2 uploadWork 实现

// enqueue.cc: L1151-1263
static ncclResult_t uploadWork(struct ncclComm* comm, struct ncclKernelPlan* plan) {
  if (plan->isSymColl || plan->isCeColl) return ncclSuccess;

  size_t workBytes = plan->workBytes;
  size_t batchBytes = plan->nWorkBatches*sizeof(struct ncclDevWorkBatch);
  void* fifoBufHost;
  uint32_t fifoCursor, fifoMask;

  switch (plan->workStorageType) {
  case ncclDevWorkStorageTypeArgs:
    // 数据已在 kernelArgs, 无需上传
    plan->kernelArgs->workBuf = nullptr;
    fifoBufHost = (void*)plan->kernelArgs;
    fifoCursor = sizeof(ncclDevKernelArgs) + batchBytes;
    fifoMask = ~0u;
    break;
    
  case ncclDevWorkStorageTypeFifo:
    // 使用环形FIFO缓冲区
    fifoBufHost = comm->workFifoBuf;
    fifoCursor = comm->workFifoProduced;
    fifoMask = comm->workFifoBytes-1;
    NCCLCHECK(waitWorkFifoAvailable(comm, fifoCursor + workBytes));
    plan->kernelArgs->workBuf = comm->workFifoBufDev;
    break;
    
  case ncclDevWorkStorageTypePersistent:
    // 持久化分配 (用于CUDA Graph)
    #if __cplusplus >= 201103L
    fifoBufHost = aligned_alloc(16, ROUNDUP(workBytes, 16));
    #else
    fifoBufHost = malloc(workBytes);
    #endif
    fifoCursor = 0;
    fifoMask = ~0u;
    break;
    
  default:
    return ncclInternalError;
  }
  plan->kernelArgs->workMask = fifoMask;

  // 调整批量偏移基址
  struct ncclDevWorkBatch* batchZero = (struct ncclDevWorkBatch*)(plan->kernelArgs+1);
  for (int b=0; b < plan->nWorkBatches; b++) {
    batchZero[b].offsetBase += fifoCursor;
  }

  // 写入工作项 (16字节对齐拷贝)
  struct ncclWorkList* workNode = ncclIntruQueueHead(&plan->workQueue);
  while (workNode != nullptr) {
    char* dst = (char*)fifoBufHost;
    char* src = (char*)(workNode+1);
    for (int n = workNode->size; n != 0; n -= 16) {
      memcpy(
        __builtin_assume_aligned(dst + (fifoCursor & fifoMask), 16),
        __builtin_assume_aligned(src, 16),
        16
      );
      fifoCursor += 16;
      src += 16;
    }
    workNode = workNode->next;
  }

  switch (plan->workStorageType) {
  case ncclDevWorkStorageTypeFifo:
    comm->workFifoProduced = fifoCursor;
    if (comm->workFifoBufGdrHandle != nullptr) wc_store_fence();
    break;
    
  case ncclDevWorkStorageTypePersistent:
    { ncclResult_t result = ncclSuccess;
      struct uploadWork_cleanup_t* cleanup = nullptr;
      cudaStreamCaptureMode mode = cudaStreamCaptureModeRelaxed;
      void* fifoBufDev = nullptr;
      cudaStream_t deviceStream;

      CUDACHECKGOTO(cudaThreadExchangeStreamCaptureMode(&mode), result, fail);
      NCCLCHECKGOTO(ncclStrongStreamAcquire(ncclCudaGraphNone(), 
                    &comm->sharedRes->deviceStream, /*concurrent=*/false, 
                    &deviceStream), result, fail);

      CUDACHECKGOTO(cudaMallocAsync(&fifoBufDev, workBytes, comm->memPool, 
                    deviceStream), result, fail);
      plan->workBufPersistent = fifoBufDev;
      plan->kernelArgs->workBuf = fifoBufDev;

      CUDACHECKGOTO(cudaMemcpyAsync(fifoBufDev, fifoBufHost, workBytes, 
                    cudaMemcpyDefault, deviceStream), result, fail);
      cudaEvent_t memcpyDone;
      CUDACHECKGOTO(cudaEventCreateWithFlags(&memcpyDone, 
                    cudaEventDisableTiming), result, fail);
      CUDACHECKGOTO(cudaEventRecord(memcpyDone, deviceStream), result, fail);

      NCCLCHECKGOTO(ncclCalloc(&cleanup, 1), result, fail);
      cleanup->base.fn = uploadWork_cleanup_fn;
      cleanup->base.event = memcpyDone;
      cleanup->hostBuf = fifoBufHost;
      ncclIntruQueueEnqueue(&comm->eventCallbackQueue, 
                           (struct ncclCommEventCallback *)cleanup);

      NCCLCHECKGOTO(ncclStrongStreamRelease(ncclCudaGraphNone(), 
                    &comm->sharedRes->deviceStream, /*concurrent=*/false), 
                    result, fail);
      NCCLCHECKGOTO(ncclCommPollEventCallbacks(comm, /*waitSome=*/false), 
                    result, fail);

    finish_scope:
      if (mode != cudaStreamCaptureModeRelaxed) 
        (void)cudaThreadExchangeStreamCaptureMode(&mode);
      return result;
    fail:
      if (!cleanup) free(fifoBufHost);
      goto finish_scope;
    } break;
  default: break;
  }
  return ncclSuccess;
}

6.3 内核启动配置

// enqueue.cc: L1565-1664
ncclResult_t ncclLaunchKernel(struct ncclComm* comm, struct ncclKernelPlan* plan) {
  ncclResult_t ret = ncclSuccess;
  struct ncclKernelPlanner* planner = &comm->planner;
  int nChannels = countOneBits(plan->channelMask);
  void* sym = plan->kernelFn;
  dim3 grid = {(unsigned)nChannels, 1, 1};
  dim3 block = {(unsigned)plan->threadPerBlock, 1, 1};
  int smem = ncclShmemDynamicSize(comm->cudaArch);
  cudaStream_t launchStream = planner->streams->stream;

  NCCLCHECK(ncclProfilerStartKernelLaunchEvent(plan, launchStream));

  void* extra[] = {
    CU_LAUNCH_PARAM_BUFFER_POINTER, plan->kernelArgs,
    CU_LAUNCH_PARAM_BUFFER_SIZE, &plan->kernelArgsSize,
    CU_LAUNCH_PARAM_END
  };

  int driverVersion;
  NCCLCHECKGOTO(ncclCudaDriverVersion(&driverVersion), ret, do_return);

  CUfunction fn;
  CUDACHECKGOTO(cudaGetFuncBySymbol(&fn, sym), ret, do_return);

  if (CUDART_VERSION >= 11080 && driverVersion >= 11080) {
  #if CUDART_VERSION >= 11080
    int compCap = comm->compCap;
    unsigned int clusterSize = (compCap >= 90) ? comm->config.cgaClusterSize : 0;

    CUlaunchConfig launchConfig = {0};
    CUlaunchAttribute launchAttrs[6] = {};
    int attrs = 0;
    
    // Cooperative Group Array (CGA) - sm_90+
    if (clusterSize) {
      if (grid.x % clusterSize) clusterSize = 1;
      launchAttrs[attrs].id = CU_LAUNCH_ATTRIBUTE_CLUSTER_DIMENSION;
      launchAttrs[attrs++].value.clusterDim = {clusterSize, 1, 1};
      launchAttrs[attrs].id = CU_LAUNCH_ATTRIBUTE_CLUSTER_SCHEDULING_POLICY_PREFERENCE;
      launchAttrs[attrs++].value.clusterSchedulingPolicyPreference = 
        CU_CLUSTER_SCHEDULING_POLICY_SPREAD;
    }
    
    #if CUDART_VERSION >= 12000
    if (compCap >= 90 && driverVersion >= 12000) {
      // Mem Sync Domain - CUDA 12.0+
      launchAttrs[attrs].id = CU_LAUNCH_ATTRIBUTE_MEM_SYNC_DOMAIN;
      launchAttrs[attrs++].value.memSyncDomain = 
        (CUlaunchMemSyncDomain) ncclParamMemSyncDomain();
    }
    #endif
    
    #if CUDART_VERSION >= 12030
    enum ncclImplicitOrder implicitOrder;
    NCCLCHECKGOTO(getImplicitOrder(&implicitOrder, plan->persistent, 
                  driverVersion), ret, do_return);
    if (implicitOrder == ncclImplicitOrderLaunch) {
      // Launch Completion Event - CUDA 12.3+
      launchAttrs[attrs].id = CU_LAUNCH_ATTRIBUTE_LAUNCH_COMPLETION_EVENT;
      launchAttrs[attrs].value.launchCompletionEvent.event = 
        comm->sharedRes->launchEvent;
      launchAttrs[attrs].value.launchCompletionEvent.flags = 0;
      attrs++;
    }
    if (plan->isSymColl && compCap >= 90 && driverVersion >= 12030) {
      // Programmatic Serialization - Symmetric Collectives
      launchAttrs[attrs].id = CU_LAUNCH_ATTRIBUTE_PROGRAMMATIC_STREAM_SERIALIZATION;
      launchAttrs[attrs].value.programmaticStreamSerializationAllowed = 1;
      attrs++;
    }
    #endif
    
    #if CUDART_VERSION >= 13000
    if (compCap >= 100 && driverVersion >= 13000) {
      // NVLink Util Centric Scheduling - sm_100+
      launchAttrs[attrs].id = CU_LAUNCH_ATTRIBUTE_NVLINK_UTIL_CENTRIC_SCHEDULING;
      launchAttrs[attrs].value.nvlinkUtilCentricScheduling = 
        comm->config.nvlinkCentricSched;
      attrs++;
    }
    #endif
    
    launchConfig.gridDimX = grid.x;
    launchConfig.gridDimY = grid.y;
    launchConfig.gridDimZ = grid.z;
    launchConfig.blockDimX = block.x;
    launchConfig.blockDimY = block.y;
    launchConfig.blockDimZ = block.z;
    launchConfig.sharedMemBytes = smem;
    launchConfig.attrs = launchAttrs;
    launchConfig.numAttrs = attrs;
    
    // 执行内核启动
    void* extra[] = {CUDA_LAUNCH_PARAM_BUFFER_POINTER, plan->kernelArgs,
                     CUDA_LAUNCH_PARAM_BUFFER_SIZE, &argsSizeAligned,
                     CUDA_LAUNCH_PARAM_END};
    
    CUDACHECK(cuLaunchKernelEx(&launchConfig, fn, nullptr, extra));
  }
}

关键参数说明：

参数说明条件
CU_LAUNCH_ATTRIBUTE_CLUSTER_DIMENSION集群维度设置sm_90+
CU_LAUNCH_ATTRIBUTE_MEM_SYNC_DOMAIN内存同步域CUDA 12.0+

7. 算法与协议选择

7.1 算法选择策略

算法选择函数：getAlgoInfo根据通信模式、拓扑结构和消息大小选择最优算法。

static ncclResult_t getAlgoInfo(
    struct ncclComm* comm,
    struct ncclTaskColl* agg,
    int collNetSupport,
    int nvlsSupport,
    int* nTasksPerChannel,
    ncclSimInfo_t* simInfo) {
  
  ncclFunc_t func = agg->func;
  size_t nBytes = agg->trafficBytes / agg->count;
  
  // 查询算法表
  int algorithm, protocol;
  int nChannels = 0;
  NCCLCHECK(ncclTopoGetAlgoInfo(
    comm->topo, func, algorithm, protocol, nBytes,
    comm->nRanks, &nChannels));
  
  // 设置算法信息
  agg->algorithm = algorithm;
  agg->protocol = protocol;
  agg->nChannels = nChannels;
  
  return ncclSuccess;
}

支持的算法类型：

1. NCCL_ALGO_TREE
   - 用途：小消息、跨节点通信
   - 拓扑：二叉树结构
   - 特点：低延迟，适合小数据量

2. NCCL_ALGO_RING  
   - 用途：大消息、单节点通信
   - 拓扑：环形结构
   - 特点：高带宽，适合大数据量

3. NCCL_ALGO_COLLNET_DIRECT
   - 用途：CollNet加速
   - 拓扑：直连网络
   - 特点：需要CollNet硬件支持

4. NCCL_ALGO_COLLNET_CHAIN
   - 用途：CollNet链式
   - 拓扑：链式结构
   - 特点：多级网络优化

5. NCCL_ALGO_NVLS
   - 用途：NVLink Sharp加速
   - 拓扑：NVSwitch互联
   - 特点：需要NVSwitch硬件

6. NCCL_ALGO_NVLS_TREE
   - 用途：NVLS树形
   - 拓扑：NVLS + Tree混合
   - 特点：跨节点NVLS优化

8. 通道分配策略

8.1 通道分配原理

通道的作用：

  • 每个通道对应一个CUDA block
  • 通道之间并行执行
  • 通过多通道提高吞吐量

分配策略：

轮询分配(Round-Robin)：

任务序列：  T0   T1   T2   T3   T4   T5
           ↓    ↓    ↓    ↓    ↓    ↓
通道0：    T0   --   --   T3   --   --
通道1：    --   T1   --   --   T4   --
通道2：    --   --   T2   --   --   T5

特点：负载均衡，避免通道热点

8.2 通道计算算法

源码实现：

static int calcChannelForTask(
    struct ncclComm* comm,
    struct ncclTaskColl* task,
    int* lastChannel) {
  
  int nChannels = task->nChannels;
  int nRanks = comm->nRanks;
  
  // 轮询分配
  int channel = (*lastChannel + 1) % nChannels;
  *lastChannel = channel;
  
  return channel;
}

通道掩码：

// 构建通道掩码
uint64_t channelMask = 0;
for (int c = 0; c < task->nChannels; c++) {
  int ch = (task->channelBase + c) % MAXCHANNELS;
  channelMask |= (1ull << ch);
}
plan->channelMask |= channelMask;

8.3 多任务通道分区

分区策略：对于多个任务，按流量比例分配通道。

static void partitionChannels(
    struct ncclComm* comm,
    struct ncclTaskColl* tasks,
    int nTasks) {
  
  // 计算总流量
  size_t totalTraffic = 0;
  for (int t = 0; t < nTasks; t++) {
    totalTraffic += tasks[t].trafficBytes;
  }
  
  // 按流量比例分配通道
  int channelBase = 0;
  for (int t = 0; t < nTasks; t++) {
    int nChannels = (tasks[t].trafficBytes * comm->nChannels) / totalTraffic;
    nChannels = max(1, min(nChannels, comm->nChannels));
    
    tasks[t].channelBase = channelBase;
    tasks[t].nChannels = nChannels;
    channelBase = (channelBase + nChannels) % comm->nChannels;
  }
}

分区示例：

假设：3个任务，8个通道
任务A：流量100MB → 分配4通道 (通道0-3)
任务B：流量50MB  → 分配2通道 (通道4-5)
任务C：流量50MB  → 分配2通道 (通道6-7)

通道使用：
  [0][1][2][3]  [4][5]  [6][7]
  └─ Task A ─┘  └Task B┘ └Task C┘

9. 批量操作管理

9.1 Work Batch结构

数据结构定义：

struct ncclDevWorkBatch {
  uint16_t offsetBase;       // Work在缓冲区中的偏移基址
  uint16_t workOffset[MAXCHANNELS];  // 每个通道的work偏移
  uint16_t workCount[MAXCHANNELS];   // 每个通道的work数量
  uint16_t collOpCount;      // Collective操作数量
  uint16_t p2pOpCount;       // P2P操作数量
};

Batch的作用：

  • 聚合多个work到一个批次
  • 减少内核启动开销
  • 提高GPU利用率

9.2 添加Batch到Plan

源码实现：

static ncclResult_t addWorkBatchToPlan(
    struct ncclComm* comm,
    struct ncclKernelPlan* plan,
    struct ncclKernelPlanBudget* budget,
    int nWork,
    ssize_t workBytes) {
  
  // 检查预算
  int nBatches = plan->nWorkBatches;
  if (!testBudget(budget, nBatches + 1, workBytes)) {
    return ncclInternalError;  // 预算不足
  }
  
  // 分配新batch
  struct ncclDevWorkBatch* batch = &plan->workBatches[nBatches];
  memset(batch, 0, sizeof(*batch));
  
  // 设置偏移基址
  if (nBatches == 0) {
    batch->offsetBase = 0;
  } else {
    struct ncclDevWorkBatch* prevBatch = &plan->workBatches[nBatches - 1];
    batch->offsetBase = prevBatch->offsetBase + getPrevBatchWorkBytes(prevBatch);
  }
  
  plan->nWorkBatches++;
  return ncclSuccess;
}

9.3 Batch聚合策略

聚合条件：

// 判断是否可以聚合到当前batch
bool canAggregate(
    struct ncclDevWorkBatch* batch,
    struct ncclKernelPlanBudget* budget,
    int channel,
    ssize_t newWorkBytes) {
  
  // 条件1：同一个通道
  // 条件2：预算充足
  // 条件3：batch未满(work数量<MAX)
  
  ssize_t currentBytes = getBatchWorkBytes(batch);
  return testBudget(budget, 1, currentBytes + newWorkBytes) &&
         batch->workCount[channel] < MAX_WORK_PER_BATCH;
}

聚合流程：

添加Work流程：

  [检查当前Batch]
         |
    可以聚合? ——Yes——> [添加到当前Batch]
         |                      |
        No                   [返回]
         |
  [创建新Batch]
         |
  [添加Work到新Batch]
         |
      [返回]

9.4 扩展Batch机制

扩展场景：当work数据超出单个batch容量时，需要创建扩展batch。

// 创建扩展batch
if (workBytes > MAX_BATCH_SIZE) {
  // 创建多个batch
  int nExtBatches = (workBytes + MAX_BATCH_SIZE - 1) / MAX_BATCH_SIZE;
  
  for (int i = 0; i < nExtBatches; i++) {
    struct ncclDevWorkBatch* extBatch;
    NCCLCHECK(addWorkBatchToPlan(comm, plan, budget, 0, MAX_BATCH_SIZE));
    extBatch = &plan->workBatches[plan->nWorkBatches - 1];
    extBatch->isExtension = 1;  // 标记为扩展batch
  }
}

10. Proxy操作处理

10.1 Proxy机制概述

Proxy的作用：

  • 处理跨节点通信（网络I/O）
  • 与内核操作异步执行
  • 避免GPU等待网络传输

架构图：

GPU侧                     CPU侧
┌─────────────┐          ┌─────────────┐
│ NCCL Kernel │          │ Proxy Thread│
│             │          │             │
│  [Send]     │─────────>│  [Network]  │
│  [Recv]     │<─────────│  [Send/Recv]│
│  [Signal]   │          │             │
└─────────────┘          └─────────────┘
      ↓                        ↓
  本地操作                  远程操作

10.2 添加Proxy操作

源码实现：

static ncclResult_t addProxyOpIfNeeded(
    struct ncclComm* comm,
    struct ncclKernelPlan* plan,
    struct ncclTaskP2p* task,
    int peer) {
  
  // 检查是否需要proxy
  if (ncclPeerNeedsProxy(comm, peer) == 0) {
    return ncclSuccess;  // 本地peer，不需要proxy
  }
  
  // 创建proxy操作
  struct ncclProxyOp* op = ncclMemoryPoolAlloc(
    &comm->memPool_ncclProxyOp, &comm->memPermanent);
  
  op->opCount = plan->collOpCount + plan->p2pOpCount;  // 全局操作序号
  op->type = task->type;  // send or recv
  op->peer = peer;
  op->nBytes = task->count * ncclTypeSize(task->datatype);
  op->buff = (task->type == ncclP2pTypeSend) ? task->sendbuff : task->recvbuff;
  
  // 添加到plan的proxy列表
  ncclIntruQueueEnqueue(&plan->proxyOpQueue, op);
  
  return ncclSuccess;
}

10.3 Proxy操作上传

上传流程：在内核启动前，将proxy操作上传给proxy线程。

static ncclResult_t uploadProxyOps(
    struct ncclComm* comm,
    struct ncclKernelPlan* plan) {
  
  // 遍历所有proxy操作
  struct ncclProxyOp* op;
  NCCL_INTRUDE_QUEUE_FOREACH(op, &plan->proxyOpQueue) {
    // 按opCount排序后发送给proxy线程
    int channel = op->opCount % comm->nChannels;
    struct ncclProxyArgs* args = &comm->proxyState.ops[channel];
    
    // 填充proxy参数
    args->opCount = op->opCount;
    args->type = op->type;
    args->peer = op->peer;
    args->nBytes = op->nBytes;
    args->buff = op->buff;
    
    // 通知proxy线程
    ncclProxyPost(comm, channel, args);
  }
  
  return ncclSuccess;
}

10.4 Proxy操作合并排序

合并排序目的：保证操作顺序与内核执行顺序一致。

// 按opCount归并排序
static void mergeSortProxyOps(
    struct ncclProxyOp** ops,
    int nOps) {
  
  if (nOps <= 1) return;
  
  // 分治排序
  int mid = nOps / 2;
  mergeSortProxyOps(ops, mid);
  mergeSortProxyOps(ops + mid, nOps - mid);
  
  // 归并
  struct ncclProxyOp* temp[nOps];
  int i = 0, j = mid, k = 0;
  while (i < mid && j < nOps) {
    if (ops[i]->opCount <= ops[j]->opCount) {
      temp[k++] = ops[i++];
    } else {
      temp[k++] = ops[j++];
    }
  }
  while (i < mid) temp[k++] = ops[i++];
  while (j < nOps) temp[k++] = ops[j++];
  
  memcpy(ops, temp, nOps * sizeof(struct ncclProxyOp*));
}

11. CUDA Graph支持

11.1 CUDA Graph模式

持久化模式：在CUDA Graph捕获期间，使用持久化存储。

// 检测CUDA Graph捕获
bool persistent = ncclCudaGraphValid(planner->capturingGraph);

if (persistent) {
  plan->workStorageType = ncclDevWorkStorageTypePersistent;
  // 分配持久化内存
  plan->workStorage = ncclMemoryPoolAlloc(
    &comm->memPool_ncclDevWork,
    &plan->persistent);
} else {
  plan->workStorageType = ncclDevWorkStorageTypeFifo;
  // 使用FIFO环形缓冲区
  plan->workStorage = planner->workFifo;
}

11.2 Graph生命周期管理

析构器注册：

// 注册plan析构器到CUDA Graph
if (persistent) {
  struct ncclCudaGraphDtor* dtor = ncclMemoryPoolAlloc(
    &comm->memPool_ncclCudaGraphDtor,
    &plan->persistent);
  
  dtor->comm = comm;
  dtor->plan = plan;
  dtor->callback = destroyPlan;  // 销毁回调
  
  // 添加到graph的析构器链表
  ncclCudaGraphAddDestructor(planner->capturingGraph, dtor);
}

销毁回调：

static void destroyPlan(
    struct ncclComm* comm,
    struct ncclKernelPlan* plan) {
  
  // 释放持久化内存
  if (plan->workStorage) {
    ncclMemoryPoolFree(&comm->memPool_ncclDevWork, plan->workStorage);
  }
  
  // 释放plan本身
  ncclMemoryPoolFree(&comm->memPool_ncclKernelPlan, plan);
}

11.3 隐式依赖顺序

顺序保证：CUDA Graph中的操作按拓扑顺序执行。

Graph拓扑顺序：

  [ncclGroupStart]
       ↓
  [Task 1: AllReduce] ────> [Kernel Launch 1]
       ↓                           ↓
  [Task 2: Broadcast] ────> [Kernel Launch 2]
       ↓                           ↓
  [ncclGroupEnd]              [同步点]

隐式依赖：Kernel Launch 2 必须等待 Kernel Launch 1 完成

11.4 Graph优化

批量操作融合：

// 在Graph模式下，尽可能聚合操作到单个内核
if (persistent && canFuseWithPrevPlan(comm, plan, prevPlan)) {
  // 融合到前一个plan
  NCCLCHECK(mergePlans(comm, prevPlan, plan));
  // 释放当前plan
  ncclMemoryPoolFree(&comm->memPool_ncclKernelPlan, plan);
  return ncclSuccess;
}

好处：

  • 减少Graph节点数量
  • 降低启动开销
  • 提高Graph执行效率

12. 性能优化机制

12.1 任务聚合优化

4X聚合规则：将大小在4倍范围内的任务聚合。

// 任务聚合逻辑
struct ncclTaskColl* aggBeg = task;
struct ncclTaskColl* aggEnd = task->next;

while (aggEnd != nullptr && 
       aggEnd->trafficBytes < 4 * aggBeg->trafficBytes) {
  agg.count += aggEnd->count;
  agg.trafficBytes += aggEnd->trafficBytes;
  aggEnd = aggEnd->next;
}

收益分析：

优化前：
  任务1(1MB)  → 内核启动1
  任务2(2MB)  → 内核启动2
  任务3(3MB)  → 内核启动3
  总启动次数：3次

优化后：
  任务1+2+3(6MB) → 内核启动1
  总启动次数：1次
  
性能提升：3X减少启动开销

12.2 内存预算优化

动态预算调整：

static void adjustBudget(
    struct ncclKernelPlanBudget* budget,
    enum ncclDevWorkStorageType storageType) {
  
  if (storageType == ncclDevWorkStorageTypeFifo) {
    // FIFO模式：严格限制内部参数大小
    budget->inArgsBytes = NCCL_MAX_KERNEL_ARGS_SIZE;
    budget->outArgsBytes = planner->workFifoSize;
  } else if (storageType == ncclDevWorkStorageTypePersistent) {
    // 持久化模式：放宽限制
    budget->inArgsBytes = NCCL_MAX_KERNEL_ARGS_SIZE;
    budget->outArgsBytes = SIZE_MAX;  // 无限制
  } else {
    // Args模式：全部放在参数区
    budget->inArgsBytes = NCCL_MAX_KERNEL_ARGS_SIZE;
    budget->outArgsBytes = 0;
  }
}

12.3 通道并行优化

通道数量调优：

// 根据消息大小调整通道数量
int nChannels = comm->nChannels;  // 默认值

if (nBytes < 1024*1024) {
  // 小消息：减少通道数避免overhead
  nChannels = min(nChannels, 4);
} else if (nBytes > 64*1024*1024) {
  // 大消息：增加通道数提高带宽

12.5 NVLS优化

NVLS注册缓存：

// 缓存NVLS注册以避免重复注册开销
struct ncclNvlsRegCache {
  void* addr;
  size_t size;
  struct ncclNvlsReg* reg;
  struct ncclNvlsRegCache* next;
};

static struct ncclNvlsReg* findCachedReg(
    struct ncclComm* comm,
    void* addr,
    size_t size) {
  
  struct ncclNvlsRegCache* cache = comm->nvlsRegCache;
  while (cache != nullptr) {
    if (cache->addr == addr && cache->size >= size) {
      return cache->reg;  // 命中缓存
    }
    cache = cache->next;
  }
  return nullptr;  // 未命中
}

13.2 常见问题诊断

问题1：内核启动失败

症状：

ERROR: ncclLaunchKernel failed with code 700 (cudaErrorIllegalAddress)

诊断步骤：

# 1. 检查内核参数大小
export NCCL_DEBUG=INFO
export NCCL_DEBUG_SUBSYS=COLL

# 输出会显示：
# NCCL INFO Kernel args size: 12345 bytes (max: 4096)

# 2. 如果超限，启用FIFO模式
export NCCL_LAUNCH_MODE=GROUP

根因分析：

  • 内核参数超过4KB限制
  • Work数据未正确放入FIFO或持久化存储

解决方案：

// 增加FIFO缓冲区大小
planner->workFifoSize = 1024*1024;  // 1MB

// 或启用持久化模式
plan->workStorageType = ncclDevWorkStorageTypePersistent;

问题2：性能下降

症状：

算法带宽从10GB/s下降到5GB/s

诊断步骤：

# 1. 检查算法选择
export NCCL_DEBUG=INFO
export NCCL_DEBUG_SUBSYS=TUNING

# 输出会显示：
# NCCL INFO AllReduce: 1048576 bytes, using TREE algorithm, LL protocol
# NCCL INFO Expected: RING algorithm, SIMPLE protocol

# 2. 检查通道分配
# 输出会显示：
# NCCL INFO Using 2 channels (expected: 8)

根因分析：

  • 错误的算法/协议选择
  • 通道数量不足
  • 任务聚合失效

解决方案：

# 强制使用RING算法和SIMPLE协议
export NCCL_ALGO=RING
export NCCL_PROTO=SIMPLE

# 增加通道数量
export NCCL_MAX_NCHANNELS=16

问题3：Proxy超时

症状：

ERROR: Proxy operation timeout after 30s

诊断步骤：

# 1. 检查proxy操作队列
export NCCL_DEBUG=TRACE
export NCCL_DEBUG_SUBSYS=NET

# 输出会显示proxy操作详情：
# NCCL TRACE Proxy: opCount=123, peer=5, type=send, nBytes=1048576
# NCCL TRACE Proxy: waiting for network completion...

# 2. 检查网络连接
ping <peer_node_ip>

根因分析：

  • 网络故障或拥塞
  • Proxy线程阻塞
  • 操作顺序错误

解决方案：

// 增加proxy超时时间
comm->proxyTimeout = 60 * 1000;  // 60秒

// 检查proxy操作顺序
mergeSortProxyOps(ops, nOps);

问题4：CUDA Graph捕获失败

症状：

ERROR: cudaGraphAddKernelNode failed with code 801 (cudaErrorNotSupported)

诊断步骤：

# 1. 检查CUDA版本
nvcc --version
# 需要CUDA 11.0+

# 2. 检查Graph兼容性
export NCCL_DEBUG=INFO
export NCCL_DEBUG_SUBSYS=GRAPH

# 输出会显示：
# NCCL INFO CUDA Graph mode: enabled
# NCCL INFO Persistent storage: allocated

根因分析：

  • CUDA版本过低
  • 内核使用了不兼容的特性
  • 内存分配不支持Graph

解决方案：

// 使用cudaMallocAsync分配Graph兼容内存
void* ptr;
cudaMallocAsync(&ptr, size, comm->stream);

// 注册析构器
ncclCudaGraphAddDestructor(graph, dtor);

A.1 核心函数

ncclInitKernelsForDevice

ncclResult_t ncclInitKernelsForDevice(
    int cudaArch,
    int maxSharedMem,
    size_t* maxStackSize);

功能：为指定CUDA架构初始化内核。

参数：

int cudaArch = 80;  // sm_80
